name: brave-sync-notes
description: End-to-End Encrypted Note Synchronization System - Monorepo
author: LessUp <https://github.com/LessUp>

scripts.install:all: npm run install:web && npm run install:api && npm run install:docs
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api && npm run build:docs
scripts.build:api: cd apps/api && npm run build || true
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:web && npm run lint:fix:api
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api
scripts.clean: npm run clean:web && npm run clean:api && npm run clean:docs
scripts.clean:web: cd apps/web && rm -rf node_modules dist coverage
